titleStmt.title: SII 25.152: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 152. (A.R. No. 152 of 1908.) MĀṈŪR, PALANI TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the Chōḷēśvara temple.
This record may palaeographically be assigned to about the 14th Century.

It registers a grant of lands along with the income from taxes as iṟaiyili to provide for the food-offerings to the deity Vīrarājēndrachōḷīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār. It is stated that three kāṇi of land to this god, kāṇi-araikkāṇi of lands to god Viṉāyakappiḷḷai and kāṇi-araikkāṇi of lands to the goddess Piḍāri was provided from the 2nd year of his reign in the Kuḷappaṟṟu at Vīrarājēndrachōḷanallūr in Vaigāvūr-nāḍu.
The royal order effecting the grant was issued to the tāṉattār of the temple of Vīrarājēndrachōḷīśvaram of the reign of a king, whose name is not given in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉac cakkaravatti koṉerimai koṇṭāṉ vaikāvūr nāṭṭu māṉūrāṉa virarācentiracoḻa nallūr Uṭaiyār virarācentira coḷi
śvara muṭaiyār koyiṟ tāṉattār Innāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum veñcañaṅkaḷukku Ivvūr Iraṇṭāvatu mutal kuḷappaṟṟil
In nāyaṉārkku nilam mukkāṇiyum viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyārkku nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum piṭāriyārkku nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Innilat
tukku Iṟukkum Oṭṭaccu Ārāṭci kaṭamai Antarāyam Elavai Ukavai kāṇikkai vācalviṉiyokam maṟṟum E(y)ppaṭippaṭṭa varikaḷum Uṭpaṭa In
nāḷ mutal Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom . Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭiyāka koṇṭu candrādityavat celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi Aṉupavikka .
Digital edition of SII 25.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
